consent.consent_text: I agree to share my name, email, and phone number with Demo Toyota so a sales representative can answer my financing question by email. I understand I can withdraw consent at any time.

message: Hi, I'm comparing financing options for a used SUV in the $30k range and would like to know what APR Demo Toyota is offering this month for buyers with a 740+ credit score, and whether you can pre-qualify me without a hard credit pull.
